visual_description: A close-up, profile shot captures a man in the driver's seat of a car at night. He is wearing a dark shirt and appears to be in conversation, his mouth slightly open. In the blurred background, another person sits in the passenger seat, also in dark clothing. The interior of the car is dimly lit, with the focus remaining tightly on the driver. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains static throughout the shot. A man speaks in a calm, conversational tone, as if recounting a recent event. He begins with a slight sigh, "Hey," before continuing his story. "A couple of days ago, Brother Chen, he asked me to go to his room." The background is quiet, with only the faint, ambient hum of a vehicle, suggesting they are in a car at night. There is no music.
